title: carex arenicola
intro: Carex arenicola, also known as salt-spray sedge or beach sedge, is a perennial grass-like plant that belongs to the sedge family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Carex arenicola are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and support the immune system. Carex arenicola can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to respiratory issues.
